data.body: Photo gallery component for Story page. Curate from existing photos: public/images/ (10), attached_assets/ (11), /Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/software/fractal-nyc-design/raw photos/ (17). Plus inspiration/references gallery (content TBD — Jules to curate from mood references/).

UPDATED: Pull photo content from raw photos at /Users/jules/Documents/Artifacts/raw/software/fractal-nyc-design/raw photos/ and public/images/. Simple gallery layout — nothing fancy, just photos that tell the Fractal story.
Story page is a single route. Photo gallery, timeline, and inspiration/references gallery are all sections within it — not separate pages.
